name: voice_quality
description: Tests voice RAG endpoint (/api/rag-search): content relevance, no markdown, factual accuracy, grounding

tests.description: Voice RAG about Moderation OS returns relevant content
tests.input: Tell me about the Moderation OS project

tests.description: Voice RAG response must not contain markdown links
Voice RAG about Safety Index should mention key technical details
tests.input: Tell me about the Safety Index, what does it measure?

tests.description: Voice RAG for unknown project returns empty or no-match signal
tests.input: Tell me about your blockchain project

tests.description: General voice response should be short (< 60 words)
Voice RAG response should not contain URLs
Voice RAG in Chinese returns relevant content in Chinese
tests.input: 跟我说说你的AML/KYC评估框架
